message:
fix(google-places): work around wiremock 0.6 header() bug on comma-separated fieldmask values

wiremock 0.6's header() exact matcher silently fails on comma-separated
header values like x-goog-fieldmask (returns 404 despite byte-identical
values). Replace header() with header_regex() via a fieldmask_regex()
helper that escapes dots and anchors the pattern. Fixes all 3 previously
failing invoke tests (search_text, autocomplete, get_place) — 6/6 pass.

Add wiremock_header_exact_fails_on_comma_separated_fieldmask regression
test that documents the bug by asserting exact returns 404 while regex
returns 200 using direct reqwest (no connector in the loop).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
